title: Mumbai Heat Wave
lead: Mumbai is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.37. The city's heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Mumbai has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 14.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 60%, and the wind speed is approximately 18.1 km/h, offering little relief from the heat. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under significant stress due to the prolonged heat wave, with no Heating Degree Day (HDD) value recorded.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of this critical heat wave event.
